JANKTHESPIRE-CRUMBLING_STRIKE.title: Crumbling Strike
JANKTHESPIRE-CRUMBLING_STRIKE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Permanently decrease this card's damage by {Decrease:diff()}.
JANKTHESPIRE-ALL_IN.title: All In
JANKTHESPIRE-ALL_IN.description:
Discard your hand. 
Next turn gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and lose {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] for each card discarded.
JANKTHESPIRE-SNECKO_STRIKE.title: Snecko Strike
JANKTHESPIRE-SNECKO_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Randomize the cost of this card on draw.
JANKTHESPIRE-CONTROL_V.title: Ctrl + V
JANKTHESPIRE-CONTROL_V.description:
Add a copy of the last card played to your hand. 
{IfUpgraded:show: It is free to play this turn}
JANKTHESPIRE-WEE_WOO.title: WEE WOO
JANKTHESPIRE-WEE_WOO.description: Deal {CalculationBase:diff()} damage. Deals {ExtraDamageDescVar:diff()} less damage for each time another player has played a card this turn.
